question: What text is written on the green and white magnet attached to the refrigerator door? A. eHow B. Chef C. Food Evolution D. COCONUT
What color is the cutting board placed on the kitchen counter? A. Black B. White C. Green D. Brown
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A woman with shoulder-length blonde hair wearing a blue and white geometric top stands in a kitchen featuring wooden cabinets and a stainless steel refrigerator. She gestures with her hands behind a counter holding a white cutting board, a black-handled knife, and a tan butternut squash. Later, she touches cut squash pieces on the board and places a whole squash down.

question: How many silver metal baking sheets are visible?

Both the refrigerator logo and roasted vegetables were visible D. Neither the refrigerator logo nor roasted vegetables were visible
Where is the stainless steel refrigerator positioned in the kitchen scene? A. on the left B. at the top C. in the center D. in the bottom left
Where is the black-handled kitchen knife positioned relative to the white cutting board? A. on the cutting board B. on the upper door C. in front of the woman D. in front of the cutting board
What action is the person wearing a patterned shirt and dark apron performing on the baking sheet? A. chopping B. pouring C. spreading D. stirring
Describe the sequence of actions performed by the chef and the visual changes regarding the butternut squash throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 4s, the chef appears holding a piece of cut butternut squash; at 8s, a knife appears on the counter next to the whole squash; at 12s, the chef touches pieces of cut squash on a white cutting board; at 14s, the view changes to show roasted cubed vegetables on a baking sheet; at 18s, a sliced round of squash is visible on the board.

question: Has the person started pouring liquid from the glass measuring cup?

What action is the person performing in this segment? A. Pouring dark liquid into a cup B. Placing a whole butternut squash on the cutting board C. Touching cut pieces of squash on the board D. Holding a measuring cup with white powder

How has the butternut squash changed from the counter preparation to the baking sheet? A. It is raw and left whole B. It is roasted into browned cubes C. It is sliced into yellow rounds D. It is pureed into a soup
What action does the woman perform on the squash after pouring the liquid onto the baking sheet?
canonical_answer: She uses both hands to toss and mix the cubed vegetables on the baking sheet.
